public_report_summary: Sonny Styles projects as a top-tier overhang linebacker whose range and urgency show up in both space and near-the-ball work.
public_why_he_wins: - Reads route distribution quickly and closes windows with real urgency.\n- Plays with enough range and pressure utility to survive modern nickel usage.
public_primary_concerns: - Coverage spacing can still get stressed when route combinations force late leverage flips.\n- Block deconstruction has to hold up more consistently when he is asked to live inside.
public_role_projection: Best used as a space-match overhang backer in big nickel structures, with blitz utility layered in rather than making him a full-time edge player.
seo_description: Sonny Styles scouting report, traits, role fit, concerns, and NFL Draft projection.
